30+ Years · National Operations · Australian-Owned

Compliance-first cleaning, built for the environments that can't afford shortcuts.

Commercial Property Cleaning operates nationally across government, industrial, education, and carbon-sensitive environments — sectors where documented management systems are a baseline requirement, not a selling point.

Who We Are

Commercial Property Cleaning (CPC) is an Australian-owned commercial cleaning company with over 30 years of national operations. We deliver cleaning services across government, industrial, education, corporate and carbon-sensitive environments — sectors where compliance, accountability and documented management systems are non-negotiable.

Our approach is compliance-first. ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and ISO 45001 provide the certified framework within which every contract operates. Carbon Neutral certification applies across our entire portfolio. A Modern Slavery Statement is published annually. These are not marketing credentials — they are operational systems that govern how the work is done.

From our Brisbane headquarters and four state offices, we coordinate cleaning programs across metropolitan, regional and remote Australia, including environments most cleaning providers have never operated in.

Our Story

How CPC grew into a national compliance provider

1995

Founded in Queensland as a regional commercial cleaning operation.

1997

Appointed to the QBuild Panel, beginning a continuous government relationship that remains our reference point for sector credibility.

2000s

Expanded to Sydney, Melbourne and Perth as government procurement frameworks matured and ISO compliance became enforceable.

2010s

Added Townsville office to support industrial and resources sector contracts across North Queensland and remote Australia. Achieved triple ISO certification across the full portfolio.

2018

Published first Modern Slavery Statement under the Modern Slavery Act. Carbon Neutral certification achieved across Scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions.

Today

Five offices. National portfolio. 30+ years of management systems built under real compliance conditions, not assembled ahead of an audit.

How We Operate

Our model

Documented Systems

ISO 9001, 14001 and 45001 certified management systems — documented, audited and maintained across the full portfolio. When a client requests compliance evidence, it exists because the system operates, not because the request prompted assembly of documentation.

Vetted Workforce

Directly employed core staff combined with a vetted contractor network. All workforce members — employed or contracted — are screened, inducted and managed under the same credential and performance framework. The compliance obligation doesn't stop at direct employment.

National Reach

Five offices coordinating delivery across metropolitan, regional and remote Australia. Geographic scale is not aspirational — it is demonstrated through 30+ years of active portfolio management across all coverage types, including environments that require security clearances and remote logistics.

Standards

Certifications and compliance frameworks

ISO 9001

ISO 9001:2015

Quality Management

Documented processes, measurable objectives, internal audit and management review. Certified by a JAS-ANZ accredited body and maintained continuously, not assembled at tender time.

Read more →
ISO 14001

ISO 14001:2015

Environmental Management

Chemical management, waste reduction, carbon measurement and environmental risk control. Applies across all contract types and site classifications.

Read more →
ISO 45001

ISO 45001:2018

Work Health & Safety

Hazard identification, risk control and safety performance across all site types, including high-risk industrial, remote and security-sensitive environments.

Read more →

Carbon Neutral

carbon neutral Certified

100% carbon neutral across Scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions. Annually certified via the CPC Carbon Neutral Calculator with verified offsets applied across the entire portfolio.

Read more →

Modern Slavery

Annual Statement

Annual statement published under the Modern Slavery Act 2018. Covers supply chain due diligence, payroll compliance and workforce vetting across both direct employment and the contractor network.

Read more →

Social Procurement

Indigenous Partnerships

Indigenous employment targets, social enterprise supplier relationships and compliance with Commonwealth and state social procurement frameworks.

Read more →

Leadership

Management team

Procurement Confidence

Built to withstand formal evaluation.

CPC is designed for the scrutiny that regulated sector procurement applies. Every compliance credential is maintained continuously. Every management system is audited annually by a JAS-ANZ accredited certification body. Every piece of evidence a procurement team needs — ISO certificates, WHS documentation, Modern Slavery statement, environmental records — is available through the Due Diligence Hub without requiring a formal request.

Transparency is a compliance strength, not a commercial risk. Procurement teams evaluating CPC have access to the same documentation our certification bodies and government clients see. That is the standard we operate to.

Access the Due Diligence Hub → sales@cpclean.com.au — response within 1 business day
